title: Onboarding Checklist Effectiveness
summary: Evaluated whether a setup checklist helped new teams get started. The checklist increased completion of basic setup steps, but several users completed items without understanding why each step mattered, so the steps did not translate into ongoing use.

quotes.text: I checked the boxes to make the list go away, but I'm honestly not sure what any of them did for me.
quotes.speaker: Participant B, new admin
